svg.title: Synalux POS — eUt payment
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for eUt payment. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: ✓ Eligible: grocery food for home prep
✗ Ineligible: hot foods, alcohol, supplements, non-food
Government SNAP benefits · Powered by Forage
Customer must enter PIN on terminal below
Offline processing is not available for EBT/SNAP transactions.
Powered by Forage · USDA FNS Authorized Processor
PIN is encrypted end-to-end · Never stored · PCI-DSS Compliant
Customer owes this amount after EBT
Federal law req: EBT shown separately
EBT tips not allowed by law (7 U.S.C. § 2016)
Forage EBT · USDA FNS Auth · PCI-DSS Level 1
